div.h1: Array of Structs (AoS) → Struct of Arrays (SoA)

p.strong: Data-Oriented Design for Cache-Optimized Particle Systems

g.text: void aos_to_soa(ParticleAoS* aos, ParticleSystemSoA* soa, int n) {

text.tspan: // Allocation uses aligned_alloc for SIMD alignment
// Allocation uses aligned_alloc for SIMD alignment

div.p: AoS: Scalar Ops Strided access prevents efficient AVX/SSE loading.
SoA: Packed Ops Compiler loads 8 floats into YMM register in one instruction.
Cache Line (64B) [ p0.x | p0.y | p0.z | p0.vx | p0.vy | p0.vz | p0.mass | p1.x ] (Only 12/64 bytes useful for position updates)

text.tspan: // vx, vy, vz, mass: LOADED BUT WASTED
// vx, vy, vz, mass: LOADED BUT WASTED

div.p: Cache Line (64B) for x[] [ x0 | x1 | x2 | x3 | x4 | x5 | x6 | x7 | x8 | x9 | x10 ... ] (100% of loaded bytes are used)

text.tspan: // Other arrays (vx, vy, etc) remain in RAM
// Other arrays (vx, vy, etc) remain in RAM
